description_long: This is an adult woman with a fit build, depicted mid-stride as if walking. She is wearing a form-fitting, sleeveless halter-neck mini dress with a deep neckline and an open back, accentuating her shoulders and arms. Her left arm is bent at the elbow and extended forward, while her right arm is bent and held closer to her torso, suggesting a natural walking motion. She is barefoot, with one foot slightly lifted as if in the process of taking a step. Her hair is styled short and closely cropped, giving a modern and practical appearance. The overall look is urban and contemporary, suitable for a city or nightlife setting.
description: A fit adult woman in a sleeveless halter-neck mini dress, barefoot and mid-stride, with short cropped hair and a confident urban presence.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the deep neckline of the halter dress, forward-extended left arm, and confident walking posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open back of the dress, the bent right arm, and the lifted left foot in mid-step.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back of the dress, the contours of the figure, and both arms in walking motion.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the dress, the forward-extended left arm, and the right leg supporting the body.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless halter-neck mini dress with open back
attribute_posture: walking with one arm extended forward
